query:
SELECT 
  u.name AS rep_name,
  p.id AS project_id,
  p.name AS project_name,
  p.location,
  p.value,
  p.actionTier,
  p.discoveryStatus,
  DATE(p.lastDiscoveryAt) AS last_discovery,
  p.discoveryAttempts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS send_ready
FROM (
  SELECT u2.id, u2.name FROM users u2 
  WHERE u2.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Brett Hansen', 'Daniel Zec', 'Dan Day', 'Amit Bhargava', 'Leo Williams ')
  AND u2.role = 'user'
) u
JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
JOIN projects p ON (
  p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND (
    JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, JSON_QUOTE(p.location), '$')
    OR JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, '"NATIONAL"', '$')
    OR JSON_CONTAINS(up.territories, '"National"', '$')
  )
)
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.crmOrphan = 0
GROUP BY u.name, p.id, p.name, p.location, p.value, p.actionTier, p.discoveryStatus, p.lastDiscoveryAt, p.discoveryAttempts
HAVING ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY u.name ORDER BY p.actionTier ASC, send_ready DESC) <= 5
ORDER BY u.name, p.actionTier ASC, send_ready DESC;
